nasb.text: The servants of Huram and the servants of Solomon who brought gold from Ophir, also brought algum trees and precious stones.

esv.text: Moreover, the servants of Hiram and the servants of Solomon, who brought gold from Ophir, brought algum wood and precious stones.

cnv.text: 希蘭的僕人和所羅門的僕人從俄斐把黃金運來，也把檀香木和寶石運了來。

ccb.text: 希兰的仆人和所罗门的仆人从俄斐运来黄金、檀香木和宝石。
